seoTitle: How to Print an Employee Report in QuickBooks
metaDescription: Find out how to generate, customize, and print employee reports in QuickBooks for payroll, HR reviews, and compliance recordkeeping.
intro: Printed employee reports come in handy for payroll checks, performance reviews, and compliance audits. This tutorial covers how to locate employee reports inside QuickBooks, adjust them to show the fields you need, and get them ready to print.

steps.heading: Access employee reports
steps.body: Navigate to the reporting area of QuickBooks and locate the reports related to employees and payroll.

steps.heading: Customize the report fields
steps.body: Adjust which columns and details appear, tailoring the report toward payroll, HR, or compliance needs.

steps.heading: Choose your printing options
steps.body: Select print settings for the customized report so it comes out formatted correctly on paper or as a PDF.

steps.heading: Apply reports to HR and payroll workflows
steps.body: Use the printed report for performance reviews, audits, or record-keeping as part of your regular HR and payroll processes.

faq.question: Can I customize which employee details show on the report?
faq.answer: Yes, QuickBooks lets you adjust the fields included before printing so the report matches your specific need.

faq.question: Is this report useful for tax preparation?
faq.answer: Employee reports can support tax preparation and compliance audits by giving a clear summary of workforce data.

faq.question: Can I save the report as a PDF instead of printing it?
faq.answer: Most print dialogs also let you export to PDF, which is useful for sharing digitally instead of using paper.

faq.question: Does this work the same for QuickBooks Online and Desktop?
faq.answer: The general steps of finding, customizing, and printing a report are similar, though the exact menu layout can vary by QuickBooks version.
